Global Stringer

Copied

Oscar Baudrand, a 19-year-old Canadian rock climber, has been training for 15 years. His parents were fans of rock climbing, while Oscar and his brother demonstrated a talent for the sport from an early age. Climbing not only brought him a lot of happiness but also cultivated his concentration and honed his perseverance. Currently, Oscar is upgrading his skills in preparation for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.
